source.section: Part 10 - Offence: Weapons & Armament > 2 - Air-to-Ground Weapons > 2.3 - Rockets

steps.voiced: Set Master Arm switch to ARM.

steps.action: Go in SMS (Stores Management System) page
Select desired rocket pods; « 68R » stands for LAU-68 rocket launcher pod. In our case, text should be boxed when selected.
steps.voiced: Select the desired rocket pod — confirm it boxes.

steps.action: Select desired Firing mode Option (SGL for Single, SAL for Salvo)
steps.voiced: Select desired firing mode — SGL for Single, SAL for Salvo.

steps.action: Set desired Rocket Motor (MTR) Type (M4 or M66)
steps.voiced: Set desired Rocket Motor type — M4 or M66.

steps.action: Set Rocket Mode to CCIP (text should be boxed) Rocket Reticle Pipper CCIP Mode Selected Rockets Selected & Armed Rockets Remaining
steps.voiced: Set Rocket Mode to CCIP — confirm it boxes.

steps.action: Set center of gun reticle on target and wait for the « IN RNG » (In Range) cue to appear.
steps.voiced: Place rocket reticle on target and wait for the IN RNG cue.

steps.action: Press the Weapon Release button (« RALT+ SPACE ») to fire rockets
steps.voiced: Press the Weapon Release Button to fire rockets.

steps.action: Once you have done your run and the Breakaway X appears, break off the attack and wave off from target. In Range Cue Breakaway X
steps.voiced: When Breakaway X appears, break off the attack.
